name: Google Drive
description: Search Docs, Sheets, Slides, and shared project files when the host agent supports it.
keywords: Authorize Drive in the host agent that will use this building.
Tell agents which folders, docs, or sheets are relevant.
Configure Google Drive in the local CLI/provider separately if a terminal agent needs direct access.

access.label: Host connector
access.detail: Available to host agents with the Google Drive connector enabled. Vibe Research does not inject Drive tools into local terminal agents.
